prompt:
Vertical 9:16 cinematic devotional oil painting video clip, slower pacing with longer holds and restrained cuts.

Classical devotional oil painting realism. Warm light falls across a scarred open hand resting on a shoulder against soft shadow; visible brushwork, craquelure, aged varnish throughout.

Scene contains:
The risen Christ's scarred open hand rests on a weathered man's shoulder, the healed nail-mark clear in the palm, the rough cloth of the man's robe beneath, the risen Christ's living face above in warm light against soft shadow. The scene is a painted tableau — a frozen moment, not an action. Nothing moves; this is a still painting.

Scene:
Start on full composition — the scarred hand on the shoulder, the risen face above.

Cut to macro detail — the healed nail-mark in the palm.

Cut to insert — the open hand resting on the shoulder.

Cut to close-up — the risen Christ's living face above.

Cut to insert — the rough cloth of the man's robe beneath the hand.

Cut to mid framing — the joined figures in the warm light.

Return to full composition.

End hold on the scarred hand claiming the brother.

Micro-motion:
- minimal

Camera:
- crop-based reframing only
- no invented movement

Emotion:
Being claimed and welcomed.

No added elements.

10.0s

9:16
negative_prompt: no camera invention, no zoom invented, no pan invented, no push-in invented, no dolly, no tracking, no rotation, no animated subject motion, no figures moving, no morphing, no scene morphing, no facial morphing, no glow added, no halo added, no light rays added beyond what is painted, no atmospheric haze, no scene enhancement, no divine effects added, no smooth transitions, no motion blur, no reinterpretation, no new elements, no text, no watermarks, no extra limbs, no flickering, no warping, no animation, no action, no subject performs any task, no body motion, no limbs moving, the painting is fixed and frozen, only the camera reframes within the still image

beats.description: Start on full composition — scarred hand on the shoulder, risen face above
Cut to macro detail — the healed nail-mark in the palm
Cut to insert — the open hand resting on the shoulder
Cut to close-up — the risen Christ's living face above
Cut to insert — the rough cloth of the man's robe beneath the hand
Cut to mid framing — the joined figures in the warm light
Return to full composition, end hold on the scarred hand claiming the brother
